\tzpentry{ID5657}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5657 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{B}(r) := \frac{\sum_{p\in\{J,S,U,N\}} \langle |K_{p,i}|\rangle_{i\in\mathcal{A}(r)}}{\gamma + \langle \sum_{j\neq i}|K_{ij}|\rangle_{i\in\mathcal{A}(r)}}. \end{equation}
